{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Laius the Younger
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Laius the Younger]] is a quote used by [[Calder]]: 'Remember the wisdom of the blind man, who does not weigh the silver in another’s hair.'<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Laius the Younger]] wrote that trenches are dug one shovel at a time.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“‘Remember the wisdom of the blind man, who does not weigh the silver in another’s hair.’ Laius the Younger.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Trenches are dug one shovel at a time.” Laius the Younger.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Literature]]
